title: stipa iberica
intro: Stipa iberica, also known as the Spanish feather grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stipa iberica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Stipa iberica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues and respiratory problems.
